Meowgon Anatomy
Meowgon - a mysterious creature which is generated from 3 parts (head, body and tail). Each of those parts is responsible for a specific skill.
There are 9 natural elements and each of them have 3 types. In total we have 27 elements, from which 19 683 unique units will be created.
There are 5 rarities: Rare, Epic, Legendary and Supreme. Matching of two the same elements open new opportunities for players.
Rarities drop rate:
Supreme: 0.137%
Legendary: 1.235%
Epic: 25%
Rare: 73.628%
